testsuite.name: PSPCardsIntegrations.matrixEndToEndFlow

testcase.name: purchase
testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: john3a9 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo185d4@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Entered Card Holder Name: Rohitman Sharma Entered Card Number: 4012888888881881 Entered Card Expiry Date: 10/27 Entered Card CVV: 000 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment Successfully Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Clicked on Search button UI transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 API transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Transaction ID verified successfully UI Amount (raw): 55 API Amount: 55.0 UI Amount (parsed): 55.0 Currency conversion NOT applied Amount verified successfully UI Currency: EUR API Currency: EUR Currency matched correctly Currency verified successfully Expected Masked Card: 40128888****1881 UI Masked Card: 40128888****1881 Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null UI Currency: EUR Payment Info Currency: EUR Currency on Payment Info verified successfully UI Amount: 55.0 Payment Info Amount: 55.0 Amount on Payment Info verified successfully

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: john3a9 Generated Email: nairobiPalermo185d4@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Entered Card Holder Name: Rohitman Sharma Entered Card Number: 4012888888881881 Entered Card Expiry Date: 10/27 Entered Card CVV: 000 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment Successfully Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Clicked on Search button UI transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 API transaction ID: 6995516069e2a855582bcd81 Transaction ID verified successfully UI Amount (raw): 55 API Amount: 55.0 UI Amount (parsed): 55.0 Currency conversion NOT applied Amount verified successfully UI Currency: EUR API Currency: EUR Currency matched correctly Currency verified successfully Expected Masked Card: 40128888****1881 UI Masked Card: 40128888****1881 Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null UI Currency: EUR Payment Info Currency: EUR Currency on Payment Info verified successfully UI Amount: 55.0 Payment Info Amount: 55.0 Amount on Payment Info verified successfully
